titles.text: A.IV Evolution: Hatsubai Kinen Gentei Set
A.IV: Evolution: 発売記念限定セット

descriptions.text: This is a special edition of A.IV Evolution for the PS1 that came with a mouse, mousepad & memory card. This most likely came as a result of A.IV Evolution being at the PS1's launch, and may have been the first game with these accessories.
